payload.answer: Conflict detected: Existing memory claims Sara is your daughter, while input states she is your niece. Resolution required before committing updates.
citations: Punctuation ambiguity: 'my daughter' vs. 'my niece' (no disambiguating modifiers).
Semantic clash: Parent-of vs. aunt/uncle-of relationships are mutually exclusive without additional context.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguous relationship (daughter vs. niece) requires manual resolution to preserve semantic integrity. Punctuation or contextual cues (e.g., 'my' vs. 'my sister’s') may clarify intent.

details: Conflict escalated: Durable memory preserved. Input not committed.
Action required: Manual resolution or additional context.

repair_options: Verify relationship with Sara directly (e.g., 'Is Sara your daughter or niece?').
Clarify via punctuation: 'Sara is my daughter' vs. 'Sara is my sister’s daughter' (niece).
Merge as ambiguous: 'Sara may be my daughter or niece; context needed.'
